title: Executive Director of Curriculum

title: Director of Early Childhood Services
notes: Confirmed as Director of Early Childhood Services per TASA career center listing. District has the Glenda Arnold Early Childhood Learning Center. 810 Old Greenville Rd., Royse City, TX 75189.

title: Chief of Learning
notes: Chief of Learning oversees C&I (functions as Asst Supt for Curriculum). Email pattern first.last@communityisd.org confirmed via Stacy Lindeman (stacy.lindeman) and Amy Smith (amy.smith). Community ISD serves Copeville, Josephine, Lavon, and Nevada in Collin County. Supt: Dr. Tonya Knowlton.

title: Director of Teaching and Learning

Email inferred from celinaisd.com domain pattern. Teaching & Learning dept oversees early childhood and elementary curriculum.
